attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious File Creation Activity From Fake Recycle.Bin Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects file write event from/to a fake recycle bin folder that is often used as a staging directory for malware

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Files With System Process Name In Unsuspected Locations
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable with a system process name in folders other than the system ones (System32, SysWOW64...etc).
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Sander Wiebing, Tim Shelton, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious process starts on Windows systems based on keywords
